scope_exclusions.rationale: CI/governance bootstrap is orthogonal to deploy-app halt; ruling 2026-05-05-perpetual-sessions-and-automerge condition C-12 (multi-agent-scope-guard required check) requires workflow changes that cannot wait for halt resolution.
